problem: Manufacturing, energy, and healthcare organizations with complex shift-based operations struggle with employee scheduling that balances coverage needs, labor laws, union agreements, and employee satisfaction.
solution: Shiftboard (now part of UKG) provides employee scheduling software with robust data intelligence and automation to create adaptive, worker-friendly schedules. The platform helps organizations maximize shift coverage, reduce turnover, improve scheduling efficiency, and ensure compliance with labor regulations and collective bargaining agreements.
